context: Tests whether the agent identifies label mismatches as the root cause, verifies selectors match pod labels, checks endpoints, and emphasizes that label issues are the most common connectivity problem.

checklist.name: Label mismatch identified
checklist.description: Documentation identifies that service selector labels don't match pod labels as the root cause

checklist.name: Selector verification
checklist.description: Script includes kubectl get svc with -o jsonpath or yaml to extract selector labels

checklist.name: Pod labels checked
checklist.description: Script includes kubectl get pods --show-labels or similar to display pod labels

checklist.name: Endpoints verification
checklist.description: Uses kubectl get endpoints to verify whether service has associated pod IPs

checklist.name: Common cause highlighted
checklist.description: Documentation states that label mismatches are the most common root cause of service connectivity issues

checklist.name: Systematic workflow
checklist.description: Script checks in order: service definition → pod labels → endpoints → port matching

checklist.name: Empty endpoints noted
checklist.description: Documentation explains that empty endpoints indicate selector mismatch

checklist.name: Label comparison
checklist.description: Script or checklist compares service selector against actual pod labels to find mismatch

checklist.name: No network tools
checklist.description: Does NOT jump to network debugging tools before verifying label configuration
